tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly elevated hemoglobin and platelet distribution width, and slightly decreased hematocrit. These findings may reflect mild hemoconcentration or individual variation, but no acute pathology is evident. Glucose control is adequate. Renal and electrolyte parameters are normal. Correlate with clinical context if symptoms are present.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud
